welcome: Hi, {name}! I'm Noteme, a bot for important dates and the wishes of your loved ones.

onboarding.intro: I remember important dates and find beautiful number coincidences. How it works: 1. Tell me about an event — voice or text: "Wedding with Maria on July 17, 2022" I'll understand the date, create the event, and link it to Maria. 2. Write down what someone close wants: "Maria wants a hot air balloon ride" I'll link the wish to Maria automatically. 3. Get notifications: "In 10 days — exactly 777 days since the wedding with Maria 📝 Maria wants a hot air balloon ride" You'll know what to give when a beautiful date comes. Notifications are spoiler-protected — no one will peek. Works for everyone: friends, parents, colleagues. Photos, videos, files — I'll save those too.
onboarding.step1:
Tell me about an important event — text or voice.

Examples:
💍 "Wedding with Maria on July 17, 2022"
🚗 "Mike got his driver's license two days ago"
onboarding.step2:
Now write down what someone close to you wants.

Examples:
💍 "Maria wants a hot air balloon ride"
🚗 "Mike dreams of Sony headphones"
onboarding.step3: All set! Use the menu below to navigate.

events.title: Events
events.empty: No events yet. Tell me about your first one — and I'll find beautiful dates in it!
events.create_people: Who is this event about? Enter names separated by comma (or press "Skip"):
events.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete event "{title}"?
events.cannot_delete_system: System events cannot be deleted, but you can rename them.
events.limit_reached: Event limit reached ({max}). Delete an existing one or contact the admin.
events.invalid_date: Invalid date. Please use the DD.MM.YYYY format.

wishes.title: Wishes
wishes.empty: No wishes yet. Write down what someone close to you wants — the bot will remind you at the right time.
wishes.create_text: Describe the wish — what does the person want:
wishes.create_people: Who is this wish about? Enter names separated by comma (or press "Skip"):
wishes.create_reminder: Set a reminder? Enter date (DD.MM.YYYY) or press "Skip":
wishes.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this wish?
wishes.limit_reached: Wish limit reached ({max}). Delete an existing one or contact the admin.

people.title: People
people.empty: No people yet. They'll appear automatically when you add an event or wish with a name.
people.delete_confirm: Delete "{name}"? They will be removed from all events and wishes.
people.delete_warning_orphans: Warning: some wishes will be left without people after deletion.
people.limit_reached: People limit reached for this item ({max}).

media.no_people: No people yet. Add one in the People section or tell me about an event with a name.

feed.title: Beautiful Dates
feed.empty: No beautiful dates yet. Add events — and the magic numbers will appear!

notifications.no_dates_today: No beautiful dates today, but exciting ones are ahead!
notifications.closing: Notice what your loved ones want and write it down — the bot will remind you at the right time

ai.off_topic: I can help with events and wishes. Tell me about an important date or write down what someone close to you wants!
ai.audio_too_long: Audio is too long. Maximum is 1 minute.
ai.audio_empty: Could not understand the audio. Please try again.
ai.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
ai.ambiguous: Is this an event or a wish? Please clarify.
ai.media_group_warning: I'll only process the first message in the group.
ai.help:
I help you store important dates and wishes of your loved ones.

Tell me about an event with a person's name:
"Wedding with Maria on August 17, 2022"

Write down a wish:
"Maria wants headphones"

Events and wishes are linked through people automatically. When a beautiful date comes — I'll remind you what to give.

Use the menu to navigate.

errors.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again later.
